# Calabi

> Ansible-driven disconnected OpenShift 4 lab on one bare-metal host

Calabi deploys a full 9-node OpenShift cluster (3 control-plane, 3 infra,
3 worker) on a single AWS m5.metal instance using nested KVM, Open vSwitch
VLAN segmentation, and a fully disconnected content workflow.  Everything is
automated with Ansible and runs on one RHEL hypervisor.

The name references a Calabi-Yau manifold -- a play on folded dimensions and
the idea of folding a datacenter into one system.

## What it does

- Provisions AWS bare-metal infrastructure via CloudFormation
- Bootstraps a RHEL KVM/libvirt/OVS hypervisor with firewalld and PCP
- Builds support guests: FreeIPA (IdM), bastion, mirror-registry
- Mirrors disconnected OpenShift content for air-gapped install
- Performs an agent-based OpenShift install with direct boot-media control
- Applies day-2 operators: ODF/Ceph storage, OpenShift Virtualization,
  Pipelines, Network Observability, Ansible Automation Platform
- Manages host CPU resources with Gold/Silver/Bronze cgroup performance
  domains and libvirt vCPU pinning

## Architecture

Single m5.metal host (96 vCPU, 384 GiB) running RHEL 10.1:

- OVS bridge with 7 VLANs: management, machine network, storage, live
  migration, two guest-data segments, and an isolated L2 segment
- 12 nested VMs: 9 OpenShift nodes + IdM + bastion + mirror-registry
- Host CPU split: 24 logical CPUs reserved for host/emulator, 72 logical
  CPUs in the guest execution pool
- Guest tiers: Gold (masters, weight 512), Silver (infra, weight 333),
  Bronze (workers + support, weight 167)

## Validated baseline

- OpenShift 4.20.15
- 3 masters: 8 vCPU / 24 GiB
- 3 infra: 16 vCPU / 48 GiB
- 3 workers: 4 vCPU / 16 GiB (8 vCPU uplift supported)

## Key technologies

Ansible, KVM, libvirt, Open vSwitch, VLAN, CloudFormation, RHEL, FreeIPA,
systemd cgroups v2, OpenShift agent-based installer, ODF/Ceph, Cockpit, PCP

## Documentation

- [Lab README](aws-metal-openshift-demo/README.md): implementation entry point
- [Docs Map](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/README.md): guided navigation
- [Prerequisites](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/prerequisites.md): what you need before building
- [Automation Flow](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/automation-flow.md): 17-step deployment sequence
- [Network Topology](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/network-topology.md): VLAN design and routing
- [Resource Management](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/host-resource-management.md): CPU domains and sizing
- [IaaS Model](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/iaas-resource-model.md): AWS resource design and cost
- [Cluster Matrix](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/openshift-cluster-matrix.md): node identities and sizing
- [Orchestration Guide](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/orchestration-guide.md): playbook and role map
- [Manual Process](aws-metal-openshift-demo/docs/manual-process.md): step-by-step without automation
